_patch_meta.description: Verse context classification — VCB-030, H7965G sha.lom (peace), mti=2508, R117, 148 verses. FRESH term — shalom reinstated 2026-05-01.

record.context_description: Term names shalom as the inner condition of the whole person — peace, welfare, and wholeness experienced inwardly; the opposite of fear, distress, or restlessness; the condition of the God-oriented soul

operations.description: New group for H7965G: shalom as inner condition

record.context_description: Term names shalom as the covenantal peace between God and his people — given by God, grounded in covenant, expressed in blessing, and capable of being withdrawn or eternally confirmed

operations.description: New group for H7965G: shalom as covenantal peace

record.context_description: Term names shalom as the inner orientation of the person toward peace — as character, disposition, and telos; both its authentic pursuit and its false simulation

operations.description: New group for H7965G: shalom as inner orientation toward peace

record.context_description: Term names shalom as the peace that belongs to and proceeds from the messianic king — eschatological, comprehensive, embodied in his person and reign, and purchased through his suffering

operations.description: New group for H7965G: shalom as messianic/eschatological peace
